In the final aggregation step (execute_python id function-call-6478176399823979718 using results from query_db batches such as var_function-call-16603674050335214067), the agent filtered to symbols with more up than down days but then sorted by total UpDays rather than by the up-minus-down surplus, yielding a different “top 5” than the ground truth.

In the final aggregation step (execute_python id function-call-4220915386537000629), the agent heuristically split the "Company Description" field to extract company names, which stripped suffixes like "Common Stock" (e.g., returning "HDFC Bank Limited" and "Albany International Corporation" instead of the expected "HDFC Bank Limited Common Stock" and "Albany International Corporation Common Stock"), causing a mismatch with the ground truth.

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final aggregation step (execute_python id function-call-10779424636828202418), the agent ranked candidates by total UpDays (with DownDays only as a tiebreaker) instead of by net advantage (UpDays − DownDays), causing it to return HDB, AIN, GTY, MTD, and PFE instead of the ground-truth list that includes high-margin names like MFA Financial and Argo Group.
